name: research-decision-support
description: Step one of vibe coding — turn scattered reading and half-formed ideas into a design you can defend. Three markdown layers (sources → ideas → output) in permanent two-way sync on a visual canvas; the human adjudicates, the agent runs errands.

interface.shortDescription: A decision board for evidence-based calls — the human adjudicates, the agent runs errands.
defaultPrompt: file these papers onto the board
